title: Cute Beds
description: Makes the beds cuter, by adding texture on beds.
body:
Make the beds look cuter.

Now there are 6 kinds of cute beds, including:

-Red Bed

-Light Blue Bed

-Yellow Bed

-Black Bed

-Light Gray Bed

-Lime Bed

More cute beds are developing!

For pictures,please visit Gallery([Click me to visit Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/cute-beds/gallery)).
